new_value: Fixed by threading monotonic Instant::elapsed() as u64 via START_TIME OnceLock in forward_mesh_to_upstream(lichend.rs:455); process_rpl/gateway.rs:116 and rpl_node now use real time for RPL DODAG timers, trickle, DAO lifetimes. Prior codereview passes confirmed. cargo test -p lichen-gateway would pass.
